meaning: n.(日本房屋起居室的)床之间,壁龛
examples: As a minimalist, I love the tokonoma concept for the following reasons.
They contain a family shrine known as a butsudan and a tokonoma - an alcove for displaying art.
The tokonoma generally holds a calligraphic scroll or painting, along with a bonsai or simple flower arrangement.
He missed on "cyanophycean" before Mahankali nailed "tokonoma" and "knaidel" for the victory.
